title: TypeScript
excerpt: description: Use TypeScript with fully typed APIs to build Cloudflare Workers. image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/workers/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. TypeScript is a first-class language on Cloudflare Workers. All APIs provided in Workers are fully typed, and type definitions are generated directly from [workerd ↗](https://github.com/cloudflare/workerd), the open-source Workers runtime. We recommend you generate types for your Worker by running [wrangler types](https://developers.cloudflare.com/workers/wrangler/commands/general/#types).…
